items.name_en: YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
items.name_cn:

Code: 8151

YSL Saint Laurent, gold buckle
Counter 'Néon' bag, latest version from Saint Laurent & SLP counters. F26611

items.name_en: YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
items.name_cn:
YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
Model: 604276
Size: 26*13.5*4.5cm

items.name_en: YSL Zipper Wallet with 12 card slots, 1 zip pocket, 2 bill compartments, 2 slip pockets
items.name_cn:
YSL Zipper Wallet with 12 card slots, 1 zip pocket, 2 bill compartments, 2 slip pockets
It has to be said that YSL wallets are really very practical. The classic crocodile grain calfskin paired with large gold hardware is simple yet highlights the brand's design style. It is a piece that stands the test of time and looks great. It can also hold a phone. Durable and wear-resistant, requires no special care.
Model: 358094
Dimensions: 19*10cm

items.name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
Fold Shopper is really amazing~
Latest runway shopping bag/mom bag
Shape: The silhouette is super great, natural and lazy yet unique
Paper grain cowhide: Lightweight and comfortable to wear, folds flat at the bottom, travel essential
Long/Short shoulder strap: Flexible switching, looks great as a shoulder bag or handbag, suitable for daily commute, short trips, business trips
Works as a mom bag too, very stylish and practical! Go for it!
size:50*20*31cm
